zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerard de Eylesford於大約1276年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親William de Eylesford II27歲，母親Christiana De Furnival15歲。他於大約1300年與Mrs. Margery De Eylesford of Tillington在英國賀福爾提林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1324年5月12日享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerard de Eylesford was born about 1276, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Eylesford II, was 27 and his mother, Christiana De Furnival, was 15. He married Mrs. Margery De Eylesford of Tillington about 1300, in Tillington, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 12 May 1324, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerard d’Eylesford est né environ 1276, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William d’Eylesford II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Christiana De Furnival, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Margery De Eylesford of Tillington environ 1300, à Tillington, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 12 mai 1324, à l’âge de 49 ans.

Er hat um 1300 in Tillington, Herefordshire, England Mrs. Margery De Eylesford of Tillington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 12. Mai 1324 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

Lui sposato Mrs. Margery De Eylesford of Tillington circa 1300, nel Tillington, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 12 maggio 1324, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard de Eylesfordが約1276年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Eylesford IIは27歳，母Christiana De Furnivalは15歳であった。約1300年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアティリントンでMrs. Margery De Eylesford of Tillingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1324年5月12日に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard de Eylesford(이)가 대략 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Eylesford II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Christiana De Furnival(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1300년 영국 허퍼드실르 틸링턴에서 Mrs. Margery De Eylesford of Tillington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1324년 5월 12일 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Margery De Eylesford of Tillington около 1300 г. в местности тиллингтон, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.
